interventions.name: I4 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: stakeholder-impact mapping routines that require harms, benefits, and affected groups to be named explicitly

interventions.name: I4 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: technical-choice-to-social-consequence prompts tying one bounded design decision to one downstream effect

interventions.name: I4 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: governance scenario analyses comparing policy, review, and accountability mechanisms

interventions.name: I4 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired ethics cases using the same stakeholder-and-governance structure in a second computing context
